zh.Hannover, Stadt Hannover, Niedersachsen,: 德國尼德薩辛韓諾福韓諾福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Eckart於1440年出生在德國時，他的父親Thomas Atwater31歲，母親Eleanor Roydon27歲。他於大約1480年與Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath在比利時利艾賀斯塔爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Hannover, Stadt Hannover, Niedersachsen,: 德国尼德薩辛韓諾福韓諾福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Eckart于1440年出生在德国时，他的父亲Thomas Atwater31岁，母亲Eleanor Roydon27岁。他于大约1480年与Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath在比利时利艾賀斯塔爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Eckart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized or Germanized form of Slovenian Ekart: from a personal name of ancient Germanic origin (see Eckhart ).

variants.name: Eckhart
meanings: German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements agi ‘point, edge (of a sword)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Eckart was born in 1440, in Germany, his father, Thomas Atwater, was 31 and his mother, Eleanor Roydon, was 27. He married Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath about 1480, in Herstal, Liège, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Eckart est né en 1440, à Allemagne, son père, Thomas Atwater, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Roydon, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath environ 1480, à Herstal, Liège, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Eckart 1440 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Atwater 31 und seine Mutter Eleanor Roydon 27. Er hat um 1480 in Herstal, Lüttich, Belgien Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Eckart è nato il nel 1440 nel Germania, il suo padre, Thomas Atwater, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Roydon, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath circa 1480, nel Herstal, Liegi, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Heristal, Leige, Belgium: ベルギーリeッジハースタル
ja.Royton, Lenham, Kent, England: イギリスケントレンハム

ja.Lenham, Maidstone Borough, Kent, England: イギリスケントレンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Simon Eckartが1440年にドイツで生まれた時，父Thomas Atwaterは31歳，母Eleanor Roydonは27歳であった。約1480年にベルギーリeッジハースタルでSophia Elisabeth Erbrathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Eckart(이)가 1440년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Atwater(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Roydon(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1480년 벨기에 리e지 허스탤에서 Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Eckart nasceu em 1440, em Alemanha, seu pai, Thomas Atwater, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Roydon, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath aproximadamente 1480, em Herstal, Liège, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Eckart родился в 1440 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Thomas Atwater было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Roydon, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath около 1480 г. в местности хирсталь, лиeдж, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Eckart nació en 1440, en Alemania, su papá, Thomas Atwater, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eleanor Roydon, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sophia Elisabeth Erbrath aproximadamente 1480, en Herstal, Lieja, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
